series_description: Files created in the investigation of a felony case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Retain for six years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer

series_description: Files created in the investigation of a misdemeanor case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Retain for two years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer

series_description: Files created in the investigation of a noncriminal matter.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year after case is closed or until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Retain for one year after case is closed or until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, whichever is longer

series_description: This record series consists of applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an individual’s or business entity''s registration, license or certification.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for three years after expiration of the credential

series_title: Case Hearing Files of Disciplinary Action
series_description: This record series consists of the case hearing files of administrative actions initiated by the Commission and will include but is not limited to, the notice for opportunity of hearing, hearing notice, transcripts and exhibits, hearing officer report and recommendation, final order, appeal documents, record certification, record of proceedings, motions, briefs, and court decisions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: After the case is closed, including all appeals exhausted, retain for three years

series_description: This record series consists of applications for licensure that have been withdrawn at the request of the applicant, applications closed due to applicant abandonment, and administratively closed applications.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for one year after request to withdraw is granted, or when the application is considered closed, through abandonment or administratively

series_description: This record series consists of applications and licenses that were denied, revoked, or suspended for failure to satisfy statutory or regulatory requirements for registration, licensure or certification, or for failure to comply with or maintain statutory or regulatory requirements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once electronic version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for three years following the date of the denial of the application or when a license is deemed revoked or suspended, or the expiration of the applicant's or licensee's appeals, whichever is later

series_title: Photographs, Audio & Video Files and Publications
series_description: Electronic and paper files maintained for internal (within agency) and external (public) use. Records may include, but are not limited to: photographs, digital images, prints, negatives, slides, transparencies, and related items; multimedia files in any and all formats including edited audio recordings and video recordings of events, activities, and other occasions for the Ohio Casino Control Commission (OCCC); pamphlets; newsletters; press releases; presentation materials; articles; information updates; posters; forms; uploads to OCCC intranet; and other information use in publications for the OCCC.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of current or of administrative value

series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, posts made or approved by the Ohio Casino Control Commission (OCCC) on its public website and/or social media sites such as Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Linkedin, etc., that are made to market the agency and share information that is of interest to the citizens of Ohio and its staff. This information can include but is not to be limited to: press releases, photos, videos, events, meeting minutes, orders and decisions, announcements, frequently asked questions, annual reports, meeting schedules, and general information about OCCC and the services it provides. Social media systems or platforms are maintained by the owners of the systems or platforms and not OCCC.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until updated or no longer of administrative value.

series_description: This record series consists of results from criminal-records checks (including Rapback checks) conducted by BCII/FBI for applicants and licensees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine-readable version is verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: For Withdrawn/Closed Applications, retain for one year after a withdrawal is granted or an application is considered closed For Granted Applications, retain for three years after the expiration of the credential For Denials/Revocations, retain for three years following the date of the denial of the application or revocation of the license, or the expiration of the applicant''s or licensee''s appeals, whichever is later

series_description: This record series consists of correspondence by, between, or with Commissioners, the Executive Director, staff, and outside entities and individuals.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for one year ; Electronic: Retain for one year

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, contractual or lease documentation for real estate and/or for the sale of goods or services between the Commission and other individuals and entities.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after original contract date ; Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after original contract date

series_description: This record series consists of digital recordings of administrative-rule hearings conducted under Ohio Revised Code Chapter 119.
retention_statement: Electronic: Recordings to be retained for one year after an administrative rule becomes effective

series_description: Surveillance camera recordings from inside the agency''s Central Office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 30 days

series_description: This record series includes reports and memoranda created by the Executive Director and staff concerning the management or operations of the agency, including coaching, counseling, and performance-related documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format until no longer of current or of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of current or of administrative value

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, documents related to, created for use at, or created or gathered at regular, special and emergency meetings of the Commission, for example, agenda, minutes, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for two years ; Electronic: Retain for two years

series_description: This record series consists of requests to join the agency''s or statewide voluntary exclusion program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine-readable version is verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for one year after an individual''s removal from the agency''s or statewide voluntary exclusion program

series_description: This record series consists of documents from the pre-hiring screening process related to individuals hired and individuals not hired by the agency, including: polygraph examinations, BCII/FBI criminal-record checks, and results of physical examinations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year or during the probationary period, whichever is longer, for individuals who are hired Retain for one year for individuals not hired ; Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for one year or during the probationary period, whichever is longer, for individuals who are hired Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for one year for individuals not hired Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies.

series_description: This record series consists of Ohio Law Enforcement Gateway (OHLEG) audit logs, which are used to audit system security and use, and investigate the misuse of the OHLEG search engine. Audit logs capture the identity of the person performing the search, the IP address the search was conducted from, the time of the search, the search criteria entered for the search, and the documents or data viewed.
retention_statement: Paper: After initial OHLEG search conducted, retain for 30 days ; Electronic: Retain for 8 years, after a case is considered closed, or the appeal period has expired, whichever is longer

series_description: This record series consists of regulated entity correspondence and reports providing updates on patron attendance including various incidents and issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format until no longer of current or of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of current or of administrative value

series_description: Electronic or textual records created to control or monitor individual access to a system and its data created for security purposes, including but not limited to user account records, security logs, and password files.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: These include, but are not limited to, the schedules, analyses, transcripts, memoranda, and other documents created to document test procedures, as well as documents collected as evidence, for use in the preparation of licensee and certified testing lab audits.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for three years or until no longer of administrative value to agency, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Retain for three years or until no longer of administrative value to agency, whichever is longer

series_description: Reports prepared on the examination of licensees and certified testing labs pursuant to Chapter 3772 of the Ohio Revised Code, the rules adopted thereunder, and other chapters or sections of the Ohio Revised Code. The reports usually contain statements regarding the work performed, findings, and conclusions regarding compliance with the Ohio Revised Code, and other applicable laws, regulations or rules.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for three years or until no longer of administrative value, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Retain for three years or until no longer of administrative value to agency, whichever is longer

series_description: Records related to testing, approval, or disapproval for placement of any device, software, hardware, or other technology in the Commission''s approved electronic gaming equipment or skill-based amusement machine databases.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for three years ; Electronic: Retain for three years

series_description: This record series consists of legal filings, memoranda, research materials, and other related documents of the Legal Division.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, superseded, or obsoleted ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, superseded, or obsoleted
